name: Smelter
notes: Unlock: Tier 0 - HUB Upgrade 2

name: Constructor
notes: Unlock: Tier 0 - HUB Upgrade 3

name: Foundry
notes: Unlock: Tier 2 - Part Assembly

name: Assembler
notes: Unlock: Tier 2 - Part Assembly

name: Manufacturer
notes: Unlock: Tier 6 - Industrial Manufacturing

name: Refinery
notes: Unlock: Tier 5 - Oil Processing. 1 belt + 1 pipe in, 1 belt + 1 pipe out

name: Blender
notes: Unlock: Tier 7 - Control System Development. 2 belts + 2 pipes in, 1 belt + 1 pipe out

name: Packager
notes: Unlock: Tier 5 - Fluid Packaging. 1 belt + 1 pipe in, 1 belt + 1 pipe out

name: Particle Accelerator
notes: Unlock: Tier 8 - Particle Enrichment. Power fluctuates 500–1500 MW per cycle

name: Quantum Encoder
notes: Unlock: Tier 9 - Quantum Encoding. Power 0–2000 MW avg 1000 MW, erratic. 2 belts + 1 pipe in, 1 belt + 1 pipe out

name: Converter
notes: Unlock: Tier 9 - Matter Conversion. Power 100–400 MW avg 250 MW, triangle wave pattern

name: Equipment Workshop
notes: Manual crafting station. No power cost.

name: Miner Mk.1
notes: Unlock: Tier 0. Impure 30/min, Normal 60/min, Pure 120/min

name: Miner Mk.2
notes: Unlock: Tier 4 - Advanced Steel Production. Impure 60/min, Normal 120/min, Pure 240/min

name: Miner Mk.3
notes: Unlock: Tier 8 - Leading-edge Production. Impure 120/min, Normal 240/min, Pure 480/min

name: Oil Extractor
notes: Unlock: Tier 5 - Oil Processing. Impure 60/min, Normal 120/min, Pure 240/min at 100%

name: Water Extractor
notes: Unlock: Tier 3 - Coal Power. Fixed rate 120 m3/min at 100%

name: Resource Well Pressurizer
notes: Unlock: Tier 8 - Advanced Aluminum Production. Powers all attached extractors

name: Resource Well Extractor
notes: Unlock: Tier 8. Free to run. Rate depends on pressurizer clock speed and node purity

name: Biomass Burner
notes: Unlock: Tier 0 - HUB Upgrade 6. Scales consumption to demand

name: Coal Generator
notes: Unlock: Tier 3 - Coal Power. Requires water 45 m3/min

name: Fuel Generator
notes: Unlock: Tier 5 - Petroleum Power. Always runs at full consumption

name: Geothermal Generator
notes: MAM Caterium - Geothermal Generator. Cannot be overclocked. Impure avg 100 MW, Normal avg 200 MW, Pure avg 400 MW

name: Nuclear Power Plant
notes: Unlock: Tier 8 - Nuclear Power. 240 m3/min water. Produces nuclear waste
